Record comparison
=================

Inputs
------

Record 1: tests/fixtures/expected/cli_record_root_rel_1.json
Record 2: tests/fixtures/expected/cli_record_2.json

Summary
-------

  =  Same                   1
  ~  Changed                0
  !  Undetermined (1)       1
  !  Undetermined (2)       0
  -----------------------
     Total              2

Legend
------

  =  Same           record matched and digest is unchanged
  ~  Changed        record matched but digest changed
  !  Undetermined   matcher could not match record

No Change
---------

[0000] = SAME
  key:        (Hash)  9b...18c
  Record 1:     tests/fixtures/foo.bar
  Record 2:     ../foo.bar
